description: Pinned test matrix versions. Updated automatically by update-test-matrix.yml workflow.

items.feature: Tax total formatting in REST API line_items.taxes and tax_lines
items.note: Tax totals may include trailing zeros in some WC versions. Tests compare as floats to be format-agnostic.

items.feature: Product brands field in REST API
items.note: The 'brands' field was added to the product REST API schema when WooCommerce Brands was integrated into core. Tests conditionally include this field based on WC_VERSION.
